title: (YTPMV) Disko Beatdown
description:
Official TF2 comeback video.

Original Song: Trash80 - At Teh Disko
Original Sources: Team Fortress 2, Meet the Spy, Meet the Medic, Expiration Date

This is a project that actually started in 2014, shortly after the Expiration Date video. A project that has been scrapped and reworked more times than I can remember. I don't know where I got the sudden momentum to finish this, but here it is, finally. I know I've uploaded a couple videos this year already, but I consider this one my actual comeback video. It is the first full video (that's not a collab part) that I put a lot of effort into since the visuals for Spies Like You. (Which will be five years old next month, by the way...) Other than a few small fixes/adjustments, all the audio was done in 2014, and the visuals up to 1:18 were done within late 2014 to early 2015. All visuals from 1:18 onwards were done within the last couple weeks.
It's crazy to think that I have been making YTPMVs for about 9 years....

As always, all visuals and audio were done in Sony Vegas.

Shout out to Rob for recording the gameplay footage for me and pretty much pushing me every now and then to finish this.
https://www.youtube.com/user/TheEpicROB
